last_explanation: Kronos projects AAPL moving from 324.76 to 298.64 over the next 30 trading days (-8.04%) -- a strong downward trend. The 20-day average (308.33) is above the 50-day average (304.18), consistent with near-term momentum tilted to the upside. RSI is 62.0, a neutral reading with no extreme pressure either way. MACD momentum is mixed / losing steam in its current direction. Average True Range is 7.99 (2.5% of price), a moderate volatility reading. Trading volume is below its 20-day average, suggesting lighter conviction right now. Recent support sits near 273.75 and resistance near 334.99.
